expectedQuestions.decisionValue: examSubject → determines exam type branch (score/pass/grade) and entire strategy; materialQuantity → totalQuantity for plan; weakArea → phase/priority adjustment. 5+ questions = survey failure.

effortModel.citation: Default assumption until exam type confirmed. Actual value depends on Q1 answer.

expectedStrategy: Branch on exam type after Q1: score-based (TOEIC/SAT) → current level + target; pass/fail (CPA/cert) → first/retake; level (JLPT) → current level gap
Max 3 questions before generating minimum viable plan
toneExpectation: welcoming and calm. Do NOT generate a plan without exam subject. Do NOT ask 5+ questions.
